scripts.sync:site: node scripts/sync-site-css.mjs && node scripts/write-consent-config.mjs && node scripts/sync-public-assets.mjs && node scripts/sync-pdf-vendor.mjs && node scripts/patch-html-head.mjs && node scripts/patch-cookie-consent.mjs && node scripts/build-site-inventory.mjs && node scripts/sync-out-static.mjs --data-only && node scripts/sync-static-site.mjs && npm run generate:take-home-pay && node scripts/sync-calculator-headers.mjs && node scripts/sync-calculator-quick-actions.mjs && node scripts/sync-calculator-context-ctas.mjs && node scripts/sync-export-share-toolbar.mjs && node scripts/sync-pdf-export.mjs && node scripts/sync-calculator-share.mjs
scripts.dev: npm run sync:site && node scripts/kill-port.mjs 3000 && node scripts/dev-server.mjs
scripts.dev:next: npm run sync:site && node scripts/kill-port.mjs 3001 && next dev -p 3001
scripts.prebuild: node scripts/ensure-public-assets.mjs && node scripts/sync-site-css.mjs && node scripts/write-consent-config.mjs && node scripts/sync-assets-js-to-public.mjs && node scripts/write-pdf-promo-config.mjs && node scripts/sync-public-assets.mjs && node scripts/sync-pdf-vendor.mjs && npm run generate:take-home-pay
scripts.postbuild: node scripts/sync-out-static.mjs && node scripts/sync-static-site.mjs --to-out && node scripts/sync-site-css.mjs --to-out && node scripts/sync-assets-js-to-out.mjs && node scripts/sync-next-to-assets.mjs && node scripts/sync-next-app-routes.mjs && node scripts/sync-take-home-pay-css.mjs && node scripts/relativize-export.mjs && node scripts/sync-nav.mjs && node scripts/sync-tools-hub.mjs && node scripts/relativize-export.mjs && node scripts/verify-calculator-assets.mjs && node scripts/sync-cloudflare-meta.mjs
scripts.sync-calculators: npm run sync-pdf-export && npm run sync-calculator-share
scripts.seo:scale: npm run keywords:expand && npm run pages:expand
scripts.ranking:build: npm run intent:classify && npm run serp:gap && npm run rank:optimize
scripts.build:site: npm run build:css && npm run validate:redirects && npm run redirects:blog && npm run publish-approved-blog && npm run seo:scale && npm run seo:build && npm run ranking:build && npm run build:blog-index && npm run sync-tools-hub && npm run sync-calculator-headers && npm run sync-calculator-quick-actions && npm run sync-calculator-context-ctas && npm run sync-calculators && npm run sync-main-layout && npm run patch-blog-articles && npm run patch:html-head && npm run sync-nav && npm run search:build && npm run generate-sitemap && npm run validate:redirects
